extractive_fidelity.detail: 4/4 claims in logic/claims.md judged faithful (load-bearing numbers AND asserted direction/polarity both match, no unsupported added clauses) against the actual full paper text (research/metrics/v3/fulltext/sal26.txt), per a frozen independent adversarial check (extractive_fidelity/sal26-plasma-emtbr-tau243-and-p-tau217.yaml) run by a different pass than the compiler that wrote claims.md. Infidelity types found: none. source_bound, not validated: this measures fidelity TO THE PAPER, not the paper's scientific validity (compiler-model.md's independent-axes caveat) — no paper-ranker should be treated as sound on this axis alone.
